Description: Supernatural Blade — a blade of pure light that cuts through darkness.
DescriptionEn: Supernatural Blade — a blade of pure light that cuts through darkness.
DescriptionFr: Lame surnaturelle — une lame de lumière pure qui tranche les ténèbres.
DescriptionEffects: Deals 75 magic damage to one enemy; -10 max Critical strike on enemy for 2 turns.
DescriptionEffectsEn: Deals 75 magic damage to one enemy; -10 max Critical strike on enemy for 2 turns.
DescriptionEffectsFr: Inflige 75 dégâts magiques à un ennemi ; -10 Coup critique max sur l'ennemi pendant 2 tours.
